name: atlas-protocol
description: Enterprise-grade security governance for autonomous AI agents. Identity attestation, post-quantum audit trails, and human oversight.

owner_chat_ids.title: Authorized Chat IDs
owner_chat_ids.description: Comma-separated Telegram chat IDs allowed to send messages and approve requests

audit_hmac_secret.title: Audit HMAC Secret
audit_hmac_secret.description: Optional HMAC secret for signing audit entries. Leave blank to use hash chaining only.
